summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: CSRF + Checkout Session Fix - Free trial users clicking upgrade now works correctly. Both root causes fixed: (1) api.js now sends x-csrf-token header, (2) PricingPage.jsx now checks response.ok before redirecting.

issues: Mixed content warning: HTTP notification requests blocked on HTTPS page - not related to bug fix

passed_tests: BACKEND: Login sets __Host-csrf cookie in response
BACKEND: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session WITH valid auth + CSRF returns 200 with Stripe checkout URL
BACKEND: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session WITHOUT CSRF header returns 403 CSRF error (protection still enforced)
BACKEND: Admin user gets 400 'Admin accounts have full access' (not CSRF error)
BACKEND: GET /api/stripe/plans includes starter plan at £19
FRONTEND: Pricing page loads with 3 plan cards (Starter, Pro, Elite)
FRONTEND: All CTA buttons visible with 'Start 7-Day Free Trial' text
FRONTEND: Free user signup → login → pricing → click upgrade → REDIRECTED TO STRIPE CHECKOUT
FRONTEND: Stripe checkout page shows correct plan (TrendScout Starter) with price

verified_features.feature: CSRF token sent in API calls
verified_features.verification: getCsrfToken() reads __Host-csrf cookie, getAuthHeaders() includes x-csrf-token header
if (!response.ok) now shows toast.error() with error message
API returns {success: true, url: 'https://checkout.stripe.com/...'} for non-admin users
Returns 403 CSRF error when cookie-authenticated request missing x-csrf-token header

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI tests passed, Stripe redirect verified)

test_credentials.admin: jenkinslisa1978@gmail.com / admin123456 (gets 'Admin accounts have full access' error - expected)

seed_data_creation: Created test user test_upgrade_z3ry6vy2@example.com with free plan for testing upgrade flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. The CSRF + checkout session fix is working: (1) api.js getCsrfToken() reads __Host-csrf cookie and getAuthHeaders() includes x-csrf-token header on all authenticated requests, (2) PricingPage.jsx handleSelectPlan() now checks response.ok before accessing response.data.url. Frontend upgrade flow tested: free user can click 'Start 7-Day Free Trial' and gets redirected to real Stripe checkout at checkout.stripe.com. Backend tests verify CSRF is still enforced (403 without header) and admin gets expected 400 error.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: Free trial users clicking upgrade got no response - nothing happened
root_causes: 1. CSRF middleware blocked POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session because frontend api.js wasn't sending x-csrf-token header
2. PricingPage.jsx didn't check response.ok so error responses were silently swallowed
fix_applied: 1. api.js line 38-55: Added getCsrfToken() function and modified getAuthHeaders() to include x-csrf-token header
2. PricingPage.jsx line 101-104: Added if (!response.ok) check with toast.error() for error messages
reproduction_steps: 3. Click 'Start 7-Day Free Trial' on any plan
4. Before fix: Nothing happened (CSRF 403 silently swallowed)
5. After fix: Redirected to Stripe checkout page
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested full flow - free user now successfully redirected to https://checkout.stripe.com with correct plan
